title: NiSource (NI) Benefits From Investment & Debt Management
text: NiSource (NI), with consistent investments to strengthen infrastructure and proper debt management, is poised for growth. However, the aging infrastructure and rising interest rates are headwinds.

title: 5 High-Dividend Utilities Stocks to Help a Sinking Portfolio Stay Afloat
text: U.S. markets suffered a bloodbath on Monday. The S&P 500 index fell below 4,000 to finish at its lowest point in a year, the Nasdaq Composite plunged by 4.3% and the Dow Jones industrials lost 2.0%.

title: NiSource Inc (NI) CEO Lloyd Yates on Q1 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: NiSource Inc (NYSE:NI ) Q1 2022 Results Conference Call May 4, 2022 11:00 AM ET Company Participants Chris Turnure - Director of Investor Relations Lloyd Yates - Chief Executive Officer Donald Brown - Chief Financial Officer Shawn Anderson - Chief Strategy and Risk Officer Pablo Vegas - Chief Operating Officer Randy Hulen - VP of Investor Relations and Treasurer Conference Call Participants Nicholas Campanella - Crédit Suisse Shar Pourreza - Guggenheim Securities Richard Sunderland - JPMorgan Chase Travis Miller - Morningstar Insoo Kim - Goldman Sachs Group Julien Dumoulin-Smith - BofA Securities Steven Fleishman - Wolfe Research Ryan Levine - Citigroup Operator Good morning. My name is Rob, and I will be your conference operator today.

title: NiSource (NI) Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates
text: NiSource (NI) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -1.32% and 0.06%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Utility Stocks' Q1 Earnings Due on May 4: ATO,NI, PNW & More
text: Let's focus on utility stocks ATO, NI, PNW, ES and UGI that are scheduled to release first-quarter earnings on May 4.
